name: Crab Nebula
description: Historic supernova remnant with filamentary structure.

name: Lagoon Nebula
description: Large emission nebula and open cluster complex.

name: Wild Duck Cluster
description: Dense open cluster rich in stars.

name: Hercules Globular Cluster
description: Bright northern globular cluster well suited to visual observation.

name: Eagle Nebula
description: Star-forming region containing the Pillars of Creation.

name: Omega Nebula
description: Bright emission nebula often called the Swan Nebula.

name: Trifid Nebula
description: Nebula with dark lanes and mixed emission/reflection regions.

name: Dumbbell Nebula
description: Bright planetary nebula with prominent bipolar shape.

name: Andromeda Galaxy
description: Nearest major spiral galaxy and prominent naked-eye object.

name: Triangulum Galaxy
description: Face-on spiral galaxy with low surface brightness.

name: Orion Nebula
description: Bright nebula in Orion and benchmark deep-sky target.

name: Beehive Cluster
description: Large nearby open cluster visible to the unaided eye.

name: Pleiades
description: Bright nearby open cluster with blue reflection nebulosity.

name: Whirlpool Galaxy
description: Interacting spiral galaxy pair with distinct arms.

name: Ring Nebula
description: Compact planetary nebula with annular appearance.

name: Sunflower Galaxy
description: Spiral galaxy with flocculent arm structure.

name: Bode's Galaxy
description: Bright northern spiral galaxy and classic imaging target.

name: Cigar Galaxy
description: Starburst galaxy interacting with M81.

name: Pinwheel Galaxy
description: Large face-on spiral galaxy with extended arms.

name: Sombrero Galaxy
description: Galaxy with bright bulge and prominent dust lane.
